aminosanStory.title: Where it all began.
aminosanStory.body1: In 1988, the first bottle of Aminosan was born.
aminosanStory.body2: Created to deliver plant nutrition at a time when the idea was still taking its first steps in Brazil.
aminosanStory.oldBottleAlt: The first bottle of Aminosan, a historic piece displayed as a relic
aminosanStory.newBottleAlt: Current Aminosan bottle, the product in use across the Juma Agro line
aminosanStory.videoAlt: Transition from the old Aminosan bottle to the current bottle
aminosanStory.a3Body: The bottle has changed over the years. The amino acid inside has been working in the field since 1988.
aminosanStory.a3StatLabel: Extra bags per hectare in soybeans, in field trials.
aminosanStory.a3StatSource: Source: DETEC (Taquarivaí, SP) and Terras Gerais (Lavras, MG) field trials.
aminosanStory.lineTitle: The right product for every crop stage.
aminosanStory.lineBody: From planting to grain fill, Juma organizes nutrition, physiology, correction and spray technology in one line built to support field management.

ourStory.body: More than 45 years ago, Mr. Julio Matino took the first step, driven by courage, hard work and love for the land. By his side, his children carry the legacy forward with excellence, management and vision, leading Juma Agro to new horizons.
ourStory.cta: A legacy that builds the future.
ourStory.familyAlt: Fábio, Julio and Julio Matino, founder and directors of Juma Agro, standing with arms crossed

problem.kicker: The gap that defines the harvest
problem.titleSentence: The toll that usually goes unnoticed sits between what the field delivers and what it could deliver.
problem.bodyRest: An uneven stand at planting, a dry spell that stalls the plant in January, a bloom that aborts in the heat, a spray the wind carries away: each of these episodes costs bags that nobody enters in a spreadsheet, because they do not show up as cost. They show up as a smaller harvest.
problem.paragraph2: The difference between a good field and a record field is almost never about spending more. It is about getting through every phase without leaving potential behind.

solution.title: The phase by phase program
solution.intro: For each crop, Juma defines the sequence: which product goes in, at which phase, for which purpose. The program starts at seed treatment and runs through grain fill, using the spray calendar you already follow. Every combination has been tested in field trials against a control, and the source of the result is published right next to the number.

step1.title: Choose your crop.

numbers.title: What the trials measured
numbers.soja: Soybeans: +5.8 bags/ha with Acorda Ultra and +10 to +14 bags/ha with Aminosan, in DETEC (Taquarivaí, SP) and Terras Gerais (Lavras, MG) field trials.
numbers.milho: Corn: +13.4 bags/ha with Acorda Ultra and +9.33 bags/ha in leafhopper management with KMEP Ultra (Rehagro).
numbers.cana: Sugarcane: +6.87 t/ha of stalks with Acorda Cana, in field trials.
numbers.cafe: Coffee: up to 74% control of leaf miner with KMEP Ultra (Rehagro).
numbers.disclaimer: Trial results compared with an untreated control. In the field, the number varies with climate, soil and management. That is why we publish the source of each one.

aboutPage.titleStart: Over 40 years in the field, alongside those who
aboutPage.intro: Juma was born from the restlessness of a man of the land. Founded by Mr. Julio Matino, the company grew by turning agronomic knowledge into products that raise the productivity of the Brazilian grower — without ever losing touch with the field.
aboutPage.historyTitle: Four decades counted in the field.
aboutPage.historyIntro: Milestones that show how Juma grew side by side with the Brazilian grower.

y1985.title: The beginning, in inland São Paulo
y1985.desc: Mr. Julio Matino founds Juma in Mogi Mirim with the goal of offering Brazilian growers the most advanced plant nutrition available — starting with locally formulated foliar fertilizers.

y1992.title: Launch of Aminosan®
y1992.desc: The first plant-origin amino acid from Juma reaches the market and would go on, in the following decades, to become the absolute reference in nutritional management of coffee, soybeans and corn in Brazil.

y2003.title: Expansion to other crops
y2003.desc: Juma broadens its portfolio to sugarcane, cotton and perennial crops. The Revigo line is born — crop-specific foliar products to correct deficiencies in every cultivar.

y2015.title: Application technology
y2015.desc: With the arrival of the Redutan and Supermix lines, Juma begins offering spray technology — application quality, less drift and greater operational efficiency.

y2024.title: 13 products · 10 crops
y2024.desc: Juma's current portfolio — products integrated into complete nutritional programs, supporting professional management from planting to harvest across Brazil.

aboutPage.valuesIntro: Principles that have held Juma steady for four decades — and continue to guide us.

v1.title: Alongside the grower
v1.desc: Agronomic team in the field, across every region. Decisions made where results happen.

v2.title: Applied knowledge
v2.desc: Continuous research and real trials with partner growers — science translated into results.

v3.title: Responsibility
v3.desc: Productivity through responsible management, efficient formulations and respect for soil and water.

aboutPage.purposeBody: More than a slogan. It is what sustains every decision we make — from the lab to the first sprayer leaving a farm at the break of dawn.
aboutPage.galleryIntro: Headquarters in Mogi Mirim, SP — technical team operating across more than 10 Brazilian states.
aboutPage.ctaBody: 40 years of experience ready to work for your next season.

0.name: AMINOSAN
0.description: Organomineral bioactivator based on free amino acids. Accelerates plant metabolism and enhances nutrient absorption at all stages.

1.name: ACORDA ULTRA
1.description: Biostimulant for annual crop startup. Stimulates deep rooting from germination and increases the initial vigor of plants.

2.name: KMEP ULTRA
2.description: Concentrated solution of potassium, magnesium, and sulfur. Provides essential nutrients for final production quality and stress resistance.

3.name: REVIGOPHOS AMINO
3.description: Readily available amino-chelated phosphorus. Stimulates deep rooting and grain filling with maximum efficiency.

testimonials.text: The sugarcane field responded quickly. More stalk, more vigor in regrowth, and the Juma technical team was here on every visit. A true partnership.

cafe.name: Coffee
cafe.description: Coffee requires attention at every phase: each stage directly impacts productivity and bean quality. Juma develops nutritional programs to support the coffee plantation from rooting to maturation.
actua: Uniform and better distributed flowering throughout the plot.
Higher fruit set, less pinhead drop.
Bean filling and quality sustained until harvest.
Reduction of the impact of climatic stress and dry spells.
Nutritional efficiency — every applied nutrient is well absorbed.

0.title: Non-uniformity and low setting
0.desc: Flowering distributed in waves, impairing harvest and production uniformity.

1.title: Fruit drop
1.desc: Newly formed fruits that fall before setting — direct loss of productivity.

2.title: Low filling
2.desc: Small and light beans, with high sieve loss and reduced classification.

3.title: Loss of quality
3.desc: Uneven maturation and loss of beverage quality — direct impact on bag price.

4.title: Climatic stress
4.desc: Dry spells, frosts, and extreme heat compromising the entire crop investment.

aminosan.desc: Vigor, roots, and resistance in all phases of coffee.

fitofert.desc: Setting, filling, and productivity in the reproductive phase.

revigophos-amino.desc: Energy and rapid recovery in critical windows.

soja.name: Soybeans
soja.description: Soy is the main crop in Brazil and requires nutritional precision at every phase of the cycle. Juma develops complete programs from seed treatment to grain filling.
actua: Deep rooting and uniform stand from planting.
Vegetative nutrition for high leaf mass production.
Maximum pod setting in the reproductive period.
Grain filling with superior weight and uniformity.
Resistance to water deficit in critical periods of the cycle.

0.desc: Irregular emergence that compromises area utilization and hinders management.

1.desc: Plants with slow growth and lower light interception capacity.

2.title: Low pod setting
2.desc: Flowers that abort before setting, directly reducing productive potential.

3.title: Light grains
3.desc: Weight and classification below potential due to nutritional deficit during grain filling.

4.title: Dry spells and stress
4.desc: Water deficit and high temperatures compromising physiology and production.

aminosan.desc: Vigor, roots, and resistance throughout the soy cycle.

fitofert.desc: Setting and filling in the reproductive phase.

milho.name: Corn
milho.description: Corn, especially the second crop, requires a precise nutritional program to take advantage of the growing window and maximize yield per hectare.
actua: Vigorous startup from emergence.
Nutrition for high green mass production and well-formed ears.
Setting and grain filling until harvest.
Resistance to water stress in the reproductive period.
Integrated program for high-performance second crop corn.

0.title: Slow startup
0.desc: Seedlings with slow initial development that miss the productive window.

1.title: Nutritional deficit
1.desc: Plants with irregular growth and lower biomass accumulation.

2.title: Water stress
2.desc: Critical period with drought compromising flowering and setting.

3.title: Malformed grains

aminosan.desc: Vigor and resistance for the entire cycle.

revigo-milho.desc: Complete nutritional program for second crop corn.

cana.name: Sugarcane
cana.description: Sugarcane requires nutrition from planting to maturation, focusing on startup, tillering, and TCH. Juma offers specific solutions for each phase of the crop.
actua: Accelerated rooting in seedling planting.
Abundant tillering for a greater number of stalks per hectare.
Vigorous growth sustained throughout the cycle.
Resistance to water and thermal stress.
Uniform maturation for better industrial quality.

0.title: Slow seedling startup
0.desc: Seedlings with irregular sprouting that compromise the initial stand.

1.title: Low tillering
1.desc: Insufficient number of stalks per hectare limiting the TCH.

2.title: Nutritional deficit
2.desc: Irregular growth due to lack of adequate nutrition in each phase.

3.title: Uneven maturation
3.desc: Stalks in different stages hindering harvest management.

algodao.name: Cotton
algodao.description: Cotton is demanding in nutrition during the reproductive period, when flowering, boll setting, and fiber filling define crop profitability.
actua: Vigorous startup and uniform stand.
Balanced nutrition in the vegetative phase for high productive load.
Setting of floral buds and bolls.
Filling and uniform maturation of fibers.
Resistance to climatic stresses during the cycle.

1.desc: Floral buds that fall before setting due to nutritional deficiency or stress.

feijao.name: Beans
feijao.description: Beans have a short cycle and require precise nutrition in the reproductive period. Small deficiencies in critical phases cause significant productivity losses.
actua: Uniform rooting and stand from germination.
Vegetative nutrition for fast and balanced development.
Pod setting and maximum set at flowering.
Grain filling with weight and uniformity.
Resistance to water stress in the critical phase.

tomate.name: Tomato
tomate.description: Tomato is one of the most demanding crops in nutrition. Flowering, setting, and fruit quality depend on a precise nutritional program throughout the cycle.

Stimulus for regrowth and tillering of forage grasses.
Nutrition for higher green mass production per hectare.

aminosan.name: Aminosan®
aminosan.description: Foliar fertilizer based on free amino acids of plant origin. For over 40 years, a benchmark in performance — acts on plant metabolism, providing vigor, deeper roots, and tolerance to environmental stress.

0.title: Low plant development
0.desc: Small plants, with low vigor, superficial roots, and uneven growth in the field.

1.title: Cycle stress
1.desc: Dry spells, frosts, management damage, and adverse weather compromising projected production.

2.title: Limited absorption
2.desc: Applied nutrients that the plant cannot absorb efficiently due to low metabolic activity.

0.title: Stimulates metabolism
0.desc: Free amino acids enter directly into the cycle, without plant energy expenditure.

1.title: Increases vegetative vigor
1.desc: Greener leaves, firmer branches, and plants more resistant to adverse factors.

2.title: Favors roots, leaves, and branches
2.desc: Balanced development of the aerial part and root system.

3.title: Improves nutrient absorption
3.desc: Acts as a complexing agent and enhances the efficiency of fertilizers applied in the spray.

4.title: More drought resistance
4.desc: Keeps plant physiology active in periods of water deficit and extreme heat.

5.title: Better setting and fixation
5.desc: More fixed flowers and formed grains — directly reflected in productivity.

linha-revigo.description: Complete line of foliar fertilizers to correct nutritional deficiencies in each crop, at different phases of the cycle.

0.title: Nutritional deficiencies
0.desc: Micro and macronutrient deficiencies that limit growth and productivity.

1.title: Visual deficiency symptoms
1.desc: Chlorosis, necrosis, and deformations that indicate inadequate nutrition.

2.title: Low absorption efficiency
2.desc: Nutrients in the soil that the plant cannot efficiently access.

0.title: Rapid deficiency correction
0.desc: Immediate foliar absorption for response in less than 72 hours.

1.title: Formulas by crop
1.desc: Each product in the line is formulated for the specific requirements of each crop.

2.title: Compatibility with other inputs
2.desc: Can be applied in the spray along with pesticides and other foliars.

aminosan.name: Aminosan®
aminosan.desc: Vigor and resistance for the entire cycle.

fitofert.name: Fitofert
fitofert.desc: Setting and filling in the reproductive phase.

revigophos-amino.name: RevigoPhos Amino
revigophos-amino.description: Foliar fertilizer with phosphorus and amino acids for fast energy and accelerated recovery after stress. Ideal for critical windows of the cycle.

0.title: Stressed plants
0.desc: Crops that suffered from adverse weather, pests, or water deficit and need quick recovery.

1.title: Unavailable phosphorus
1.desc: Soils with high phosphorus fixation or conditions that limit root absorption.

2.title: Low metabolic energy
2.desc: Plants with slow metabolism that do not respond well to applied inputs.

0.title: Provides immediate energy
0.desc: Highly soluble foliar phosphorus for quick energy to metabolism.

1.title: Accelerated recovery
1.desc: Amino acids enhance the plant's response after stress periods.

2.title: Ideal for critical windows
2.desc: Precise application at decisive moments of the productive cycle.

aminosan.name: Aminosan®
aminosan.desc: Vigor and resistance in all phases.

revigo-cobre-ultra.name: Revigo Copper Ultra
revigo-cobre-ultra.description: Complexed copper for physiological strength and plant resistance. High-efficiency formulation for correction and prevention of deficiencies.

0.title: Copper deficiency
0.desc: Crops with deficiency symptoms that affect development and resistance.

1.title: Low disease resistance
1.desc: Plants with lower physiological resistance to fungal and bacterial pathogens.

0.title: Copper deficiency correction
0.desc: Fast foliar absorption with highly bioavailable complexed copper.

1.title: Physiological strengthening
1.desc: Copper activates essential enzymes for resistance and photosynthesis.

aminosan.name: Aminosan®
aminosan.desc: Vigor and resistance for the entire cycle.

acorda-cana.name: Acorda Cana
acorda-cana.description: Rooting, vigor, and more productivity in sugarcane, starting from planting. Formulated to stimulate the initial development of the crop.

0.title: Slow startup
0.desc: Seedlings with slow initial development, missing essential productive windows.

1.title: Insufficient rooting
1.desc: Shallow root system that limits water and nutrient absorption throughout the cycle.

0.title: Accelerated rooting
0.desc: Stimulates root system development from the first days after planting.

1.title: Stronger startup
1.desc: Plants with greater initial vigor respond better to base fertilization.

0.label: Planting
0.title: Seedling treatment
0.desc: Application before or during planting for immediate startup.

acorda-ultra.name: Acorda Ultra
acorda-ultra.description: Strong startup and deep rooting from the first day in the soil. For soybeans, corn, cotton, and beans.

0.title: Uneven stand
0.desc: Irregular emergence that compromises area utilization and management.

1.title: Superficial roots
1.desc: Shallow root system that limits drought resistance and nutrient absorption.

0.title: More uniform stand
0.desc: Homogeneous emergence for a more productive and easier-to-manage plot.

1.title: Deeper roots
1.desc: Robust root system for better use of water and nutrients.

0.label: Seed
0.title: Treatment
0.desc: Applied directly to the seed before planting.

aduban.name: Aduban
aduban.description: Balanced soil and more nutrient absorption by the young plant. For soybeans, corn, coffee, and beans.

0.title: Low nutrient availability
0.desc: Soil with blocked nutrients due to inadequate pH or biological competition.

1.title: Fragile young plant
1.desc: Seedlings with slow development due to an unbalanced soil environment.

0.title: Improves root environment
0.desc: Stimulates beneficial microorganisms for greater nutrient availability.

1.title: More efficient absorption
1.desc: Young plant with better access to nutrients from germination.

0.label: Seed
0.title: Treatment
0.desc: Applied to the seed for immediate action in the soil.

kmep-ultra.name: Kmep Ultra
kmep-ultra.description: Potentiates insecticides and improves pest control efficiency. Specialized adjuvant to maximize application results.

0.title: Inefficient pest control
0.desc: Insecticides with low performance due to deposition and absorption difficulties.

1.title: Pest resistance
1.desc: Need for increasingly higher doses for the same result.

0.title: Greater insecticide efficiency
0.desc: Potentiates the action of the active ingredient, improving coverage and absorption.

1.title: Better deposition
1.desc: Reduces surface tension for better spreading over the leaf and the pest.

linha-redutan.name: Redutan Line
linha-redutan.description: Spray quality, less drift, and more operational efficiency. The complete line to optimize every spray in the field.

0.title: Excessive drift
0.desc: Loss of product due to drift, contaminating neighboring areas and reducing efficiency.

1.title: Unstable spray
1.desc: Incompatible mixtures that crystallize or clog nozzles and filters.

0.title: Less drift
0.desc: Reduces the formation of fine drops that drift with the wind during spraying.

1.title: More stable spray
1.desc: Improves compatibility between products in the tank for safe applications.

supermix.name: Supermix
supermix.description: Adjuvant for uniform spray, without clogging and greater compatibility between products in the tank.

0.title: Non-homogeneous spray
0.desc: Products that do not mix well generating uneven application.

1.title: Nozzle clogging
1.desc: Precipitation of products in the spray causing operational failures in the field.

0.title: Homogeneous spray
0.desc: Improves the mixture between products for uniform application throughout the plot.

1.title: No clogging
1.desc: Prevents precipitation of products in the spray, protecting the equipment.

revigo-milho.name: Revigo + Corn
revigo-milho.description: Strategic nutrition for second crop corn — real gain per hectare with integrated nutritional program.

0.title: Low potential second crop corn
0.desc: Crop with a short window that needs precise nutrition to reach the yield ceiling.

1.title: Water stress in the second crop
1.desc: Drier period that requires greater metabolic efficiency from the plant.

0.title: Complete nutritional program
0.desc: Combination of products assembled for each critical phase of second crop corn.

1.title: Proven result in the field
1.desc: Gains measured in trials conducted in partnership with farmers.

0.label: V3–V5
0.title: Establishment
0.desc: Early application for a solid start.

1.label: V8–V10
1.title: Growth
1.desc: Foliar nutrition for vigor and leaf mass.

2.label: Tasseling
2.title: Pre-reproductive
2.desc: Preparation for flowering.

aminosan.name: Aminosan®
aminosan.desc: Vigor and resistance for the entire cycle.

revigo-pasto.name: Revigo + Pasture
revigo-pasto.description: Pasture recovery, weight gain, and more stocking per hectare with strategic nutrition for forage grasses.

0.title: Degraded pasture
0.desc: Forage grasses with low density, invasive species, and reduced carrying capacity.

1.title: Low weight gain
1.desc: Animal with low nutritional quality forage, impacting zootechnical results.

0.title: Forage recovery
0.desc: Foliar nutrition that stimulates regrowth and improves pasture density.

1.title: Higher stocking
1.desc: More productive pasture with greater carrying capacity per hectare.

aminosan.name: Aminosan®
aminosan.desc: Vigor and resistance for the entire cycle.
